title: The Shawshank Redemption
plot_summary: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Godfather
plot_summary: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: The Dark Knight
plot_summary: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime with the help of Lt. Gordon and DA Harvey Dent, but the Joker wreaks havoc.

title: Schindler's List
plot_summary: In German-occupied Poland, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
plot_summary: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam.

title: Pulp Fiction
plot_summary: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and a pair of bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: 12 Angry Men
plot_summary: A jury holdout attempts to prevent a miscarriage of justice by forcing his colleagues to reconsider the evidence.

title: The Good the Bad and the Ugly
plot_summary: A bounty hunting scam joins two men in an uneasy alliance against a third in a race to find a fortune in gold.

title: Fight Club
plot_summary: An insomniac office worker forms an underground fight club with a soap salesman that becomes something more sinister.

title: Forrest Gump
plot_summary: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, Vietnam, and other events unfold through the perspective of a man with a low IQ.

title: Inception
plot_summary: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is tasked with planting an idea into a CEO's mind.

title: The Matrix
plot_summary: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Goodfellas
plot_summary: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his career from the 1950s to the 1980s.

title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
plot_summary: A criminal pleads insanity and is admitted to a mental institution, where he rebels against the oppressive nurse.

title: Interstellar
plot_summary: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Se7en
plot_summary: Two detectives hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
plot_summary: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an imprisoned cannibal killer to catch another serial killer.

title: Saving Private Ryan
plot_summary: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of US soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper.

title: The Green Mile
plot_summary: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges, a huge man with a mysterious gift.

title: Parasite
plot_summary: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between a wealthy family and a poor one.

title: The Prestige
plot_summary: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything.

title: The Lion King
plot_summary: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his treacherous uncle, who wants to seize the throne.

title: Whiplash
plot_summary: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cutthroat music conservatory where his teacher will stop at nothing to push him to greatness.

title: Gladiator
plot_summary: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.

title: The Departed
plot_summary: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang.

title: American History X
plot_summary: A former neo-nazi skinhead tries to prevent his younger brother from going down the same wrong path.

title: Memento
plot_summary: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer using notes and tattoos.

title: The Usual Suspects
plot_summary: A sole survivor tells of the twisty events leading up to a horrific gun battle on a boat, which begin when five criminals meet at a line-up.

title: Léon: The Professional
plot_summary: 12-year-old Mathilda is taken in by Léon, a professional cleaner, after her family is murdered by a corrupt DEA agent.

title: Spirited Away
plot_summary: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits.

title: Back to the Future
plot_summary: Marty McFly is accidentally sent back in time to 1955, where he must ensure his parents fall in love.

title: The Pianist
plot_summary: A Polish Jewish musician struggles to survive the destruction of the Warsaw Ghetto during World War II.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
plot_summary: A cyborg, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her teenage son John from a more advanced model.

title: Alien
plot_summary: After a space merchant vessel receives an unknown transmission as a distress call, one of the crew is attacked by a mysterious life form.

title: WALL-E
plot_summary: In the far future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

title: Avengers: Infinity War
plot_summary: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos.

title: Django Unchained
plot_summary: With the help of a German bounty-hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
plot_summary: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort, from his rise to a wealthy stockbroker living the high life to his fall involving crime and corruption.

title: Inglourious Basterds
plot_summary: In Nazi-occupied France during World War II, a plan to assassinate Nazi leaders by a group of Jewish US soldiers coincides with a plan by a cinema owner.

title: Joker
plot_summary: In Gotham City, mentally troubled comedian Arthur Fleck embarks on a downward spiral of revolution and bloody crime.

title: The Shining
plot_summary: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
plot_summary: Humanity finds a mysterious object buried beneath the lunar surface and sets off to find its origins.

title: Apocalypse Now
plot_summary: A US Army officer serving in Vietnam is tasked with assassinating a renegade Special Forces Colonel.

title: Heat
plot_summary: A group of professional bank robbers start to feel the heat from police when they unknowingly leave a clue at their latest heist.

title: Toy Story
plot_summary: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as top toy.

title: No Country for Old Men
plot_summary: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.

title: A Beautiful Mind
plot_summary: After John Nash, a brilliant but asocial mathematician, accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish.

title: The Truman Show
plot_summary: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

title: Requiem for a Dream
plot_summary: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island people are shattered when their addictions run deep.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
plot_summary: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories.
